title: Trump booed before Knicks lose to Spurs at Madison Square Garden in NBA Finals Game 3
summary_full: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
summary_public: Trump's decision to attend Game 3 of the NBA Final was controversial for Knicks fans, some of whom feared he would jinx what has been an epic playoff run.
